title: Dutch Bean and Citrus Gratin
description: A creamy, citrusy side dish made with Dutch beans, perfect for a light and satisfying meal. This gratin is easy to make and can be served as a side or a light main course.
instructions: In a large saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the citrus zest and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the Dutch beans, citrus juice, salt, and pepper. Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the beans are coated in the citrus mixture.
Transfer the bean mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top the beans with the grated cheese.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with additional citrus zest if desired.
